title: NHKマイルCの後に・次は頂点へ

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I guess mile races really are my forte. I
always feel so confident while I run!
choice_data_list: Then how about running some more miles?
Then how about running some more miles?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
choice_data_list: Your next step is to become the champion!
Your next step is to become the champion!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The champion? Oh, you're talking about the Mile
Championship!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I think I'm up to the challenge now. Let's
ride this wave and keep on winning!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we decide to make the Mile
Championship our next goal.
